I'll review CP00-057 by examining the actual repository state to verify the diff's claims, not just reading the diff in isolation. Let me start by exploring the key files.

`★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`
This is a read-only adjudication review. The diff follows an established "boundary suite" pattern (CP00-054/055/056). My job is to verify the *new* pack honors plan binding, no-write invariants, fail-closed tenancy, and validator/test coverage — and to separate genuine code defects from the expected "evidence not yet generated" state at review time.
`─────────────────────────────────────────────────`

Let me verify the pack-plan binding first, which is the foundation of the whole pack.
